title: Ok i need to get this outa my system
display_title: Ok i need to get this outa my system
wikitext:
[]: Ok i need to get this outa my system             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 12:10 pm Im sorry for posting this I just need to get this outa my system. Doesnt Anno look like Gendo in this pic. im sorry Anno, im not sorry gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Jul 27, 2006 1:22 pm Ah, yes. Well, his hand DOES seem to resemble the hand of the pupeteers. Just give him Gendo glasses, gloved hands, and a text bubble that says 'DANCE, MY PUPPETS, DANCE!' and you've got Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Thu Jul 27, 2006 1:30 pm I think Anno modled Gendo after himself. Anno probably struts in his miror singing im too sexy cuz im gendo
